C1310C_DSRGNZD_THKNG_IND C1310C_DSRGNZD_THKNG_IND C1310C Signs and Symptoms of Delirium: Disorganized Thinking CHAR 1 Indicates whether the resident exhibits signs and symptoms of disorganized thinking. -=Not assessed/no information
 0=Behavior not present
 1=Behavior continuously present, does not fluctuate
 2=Behavior present, fluctuates (comes and goes, changes in severity)
^=Blank (skip pattern) effective10/01/2016
